name: HuggingFaceConnector
description: Connects to the HuggingFace Hub, Inference API, and managed Inference Endpoints. Supports listing/getting models/datasets/spaces, running text generation, embeddings, classification, summarization, translation, image classification, and managing dedicated inference deployments.

install_fields.label: HuggingFace API Token
install_fields.help: Generate at huggingface.co/settings/tokens (read or write scope). Sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <api_key>' on every Hub, Inference, and Inference Endpoints request.

install_fields.label: Hub Base URL
install_fields.help: Base URL for the HuggingFace Hub REST API. Override only for a private mirror.

install_fields.label: Inference Base URL
install_fields.help: Base URL for the serverless HuggingFace Inference API.

install_fields.label: Inference Endpoints Base URL
install_fields.help: Base URL for the managed Inference Endpoints API. Override for self-hosted gateways.

install_fields.label: Default Model
install_fields.help: Default model id used by inference helpers when the caller does not specify one.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Soft client-side cap on HuggingFace API requests per minute. Default is 60 (free-tier safe).

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates the api_key and marks the connector installed.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies HuggingFace API connectivity by calling GET /whoami-v2.

apis.name: Whoami
apis.description: GET /whoami-v2 — returns the authenticated user's identity.

apis.name: List Models
apis.description: GET /models — list Hub models matching search/author/filter/sort/limit.

apis.name: Get Model
apis.description: GET /models/{id} — fetch a single model's full metadata.

apis.name: List Datasets
apis.description: GET /datasets — list Hub datasets matching the given search.

apis.name: Get Dataset
apis.description: GET /datasets/{id}.

apis.name: List Spaces
apis.description: GET /spaces — list HuggingFace Spaces matching the given search.

apis.name: List Organization Repos
apis.description: GET /organizations/{name} — list public repos for an organization.

apis.name: Run Inference
apis.description: POST {inference}/models/{model} — generic JSON inference entry point.

apis.name: Text Generation
apis.description: POST {inference}/models/{model} — text-generation completion.

apis.name: Feature Extraction
apis.description: POST {inference}/models/{model} — return embedding vector(s).

apis.name: Text Classification
apis.description: POST {inference}/models/{model} — classification scores for inputs.

apis.name: Summarization
apis.description: POST {inference}/models/{model} — summarize inputs.

apis.name: Translation
apis.description: POST {inference}/models/{model} — translate inputs.

apis.name: Image Classification
apis.description: POST {inference}/models/{model} — classify a raw image (binary body).

apis.name: List Inference Endpoints
apis.description: GET {endpoints}/endpoint — list managed Inference Endpoints.

apis.name: Get Inference Endpoint
apis.description: GET {endpoints}/endpoint/{name}.

apis.name: Create Inference Endpoint
apis.description: POST {endpoints}/endpoint — create a managed deployment.

apis.name: Delete Inference Endpoint
apis.description: DELETE {endpoints}/endpoint/{name}.

apis.name: Run Inference Endpoint
apis.description: POST {endpoint_url} — invoke a managed Inference Endpoint by its served URL.
